full_text:
Yuan Ba 袁霸
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yuan Ba (袁霸)was born in Fule county, Chen commandery. Advised Cao Cao to become Duke and Cao Pi to become emperor. Yuan Ba was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
